steps.title: Read the direction of the trend
steps.content: The line of best fit slopes downward from left to right. Since the $x$-axis is elevation and the $y$-axis is temperature, moving right means increasing elevation.

steps.title: Use a slope check
steps.content: A quick Desmos check with two points on the fit line gives a negative slope, confirming that temperature decreases as elevation increases.

steps.title: Match the statement
steps.content: A negative association means higher elevation tends to go with lower temperature. That confirms B.
